return(function(...)local E={"\071\083\054\061","\052\071\047\081\077\082\112\061";"\082\070\110\100\082\099\090\076\074\118\054\061","\085\070\100\097","\078\114\088\089\087\106\049\049\048\070\119\102\078\114\085\070\080\101\055\061","\082\101\053\103\082\067\111\088\055\113\082\101\071\103\075\065";"\050\114\079\081\071\051\049\113\087\090\049\075\084\051\101\067","\082\109\061\061","\107\108\075\049\080\053\088\076\119\099\111\068\088\106\111\118\080\109\061\061";"\084\081\107\120\121\099\075\113";"\121\070\110\043\121\103\074\090\071\108\088\106\121\099\110\100";"\079\112\061\061";"\074\103\101\105\074\087\061\061";"\090\068\061\061","\118\090\110\105\074\118\107\111\082\070\101\076\071\070\115\061","\121\081\074\065\121\104\112\103\099\118\111\053\048\122\111\068\087\068\061\061";"\074\081\088\090\055\112\061\061";"\072\087\061\061","\080\065\047\072\053\109\061\061","\071\070\110\111\074\067\088\106\084\108\122\100\074\068\061\061","\053\043\080\053";"\118\090\085\088\114\112\061\061";"\118\106\084\061","\057\057\090\099\084\068\061\061","\082\081\122\049\080\070\122\050\115\067\074\111\055\081\074\088","\113\111\077\043\111\112\061\061","\121\087\061\061";"\080\118\112\120\088\119\111\043\121\083\049\049\084\053\054\068\121\112\061\061";"\055\113\122\106\074\087\061\061";"\107\103\119\106\115\103\119\120\082\108\122\051\074\087\061\061","\082\070\110\104\082\067\049\116\071\108\084\061";"\082\070\101\104\121\068\061\061";"\113\113\049\122\056\074\077\078\122\049\070\106\072\088\103\052\109\073\116\099\043\110\073\080\069\072\054\081\103\104\073\116\122\069\089\121\122\118\085\097\107\071\106\098\083\115\066\099\078\108\053\066\079\051\098\116\120\089\071\118\075\053\048\118\047\102\052\087\102\111\121\078\111\067\053\051\097\048\109\119\055\073\115\109\056\117\087\099\085\099\105\115\102\100\083\102\081\069\078\097\065\087\061\061";"\054\087\061\061";"\107\105\051\117\077\068\061\061","\071\074\117\073\049\086\099\101";"\118\090\110\116\071\108\107\122\078\109\061\061","\051\082\052\ return(function(E,j,H,O,L,A,y,V,h,a,U,D,I,z,m,K,Y,F,u,G,B,x,r)F,U,V,I,K,Y,G,r,B,a,x,z,m,u,h,D=function(E,e)local j=I(e)local H=function(H,O,L)return m(E,{H,O,L},e,j)end return H end,function(E,e)local j=I(e)local H=function(H,O)return m(E,{H,O},e,j)end return H end return(z(6525038-1043292,{}))(j(y))end)(getfenv and getfenv()or _ENV,unpack or table[e(621499+-601099)],newproxy,setmetatable,getmetatable,select,{...})end)(...)
